insights: Most participants performed strongly on practical AI use cases but found deployment and model-risk questions harder.
Current affairs questions had high engagement when they were recognizable and linked to broad industry themes.
Questions with plausible distractors created better differentiation than questions with one obviously correct answer.

questionStats.question: Q17 - Uneven model performance across regions
questionStats.note: This was the toughest question and likely reflects lower familiarity with data distribution shift.

questionStats.question: Q8 - HCP segmentation inputs
questionStats.note: Strong recognition of commercial AI use cases among respondents.

questionStats.question: Q20 - Scaling AI across geographies
questionStats.note: Architecture and governance remain areas where the audience was more divided.
